hooks.command: if git diff --quiet HEAD 2>/dev/null && [ "$(git symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null)" = "main" ]; then out=$(git pull origin main --ff-only 2>&1); if [ $? -eq 0 ] && ! echo "$out" | grep -q "Already up to date"; then printf '{"systemMessage":"Auto-pulled origin/main (Overleaf updates available)"}'; fi; fi; exit 0
